tasks.title: Admin + Settings + Bridge API types & client
Settings + Admin Zustand stores
React Query hooks: settings, admin, bridge
RBAC nav update + Admin layout + Settings page
Settings components + Admin sidebar
tasks.description:
Build the Settings UI components and the Admin navigation sidebar.

## File 1: `packages/ui/src/components/settings/profile-card.tsx`
'use client' component showing user profile info (read-only from session).
```tsx
interface ProfileCardProps {
  role: string;
  roleLevel: number;
  // Session data comes from NextAuth or auth context
}
```
Layout:
- Card with surface background, rounded, border
- Top: Large initials avatar (based on name, accent bg, white text, 64x64 rounded-full)
- Fields (label + value rows): Name (from session), Email, Role (badge with color by level), Department, Role Level
- SessionInfo section: Auth type, Last login, Permissions (list of badges)
- All read-only, no edit buttons
- Use Lucide icons: User, Mail, Shield, Building2, Key

## File 2: `packages/ui/src/components/settings/preferences-form.tsx`
'use client' component for language, theme, notifications.
```tsx
import { useSettingsStore } from somewhere; // Import path note in description
import { useTheme } from 'next-themes';
```
- Language: Two toggle buttons (PL | EN). On click → `setLanguage()`. Active = accent bg.
- Theme: Two toggle buttons (Ciemny | Jasny). Uses `useTheme()` from next-themes to `setTheme('dark' | 'light')`.
- Notifications: Three switches (toggle component):
  - Alerty email (email_alerts)
  - Alerty WhatsApp (whatsapp_alerts) 
  - Poranny brief (daily_brief)
- Each switch updates `settingsStore.setNotifications()`
- Note: notification toggles are MVP client-side only — no backend call yet. Show subtle "(wkrótce)" note next to notification section title.
- Card layout consistent with ProfileCard.

Note for dev: Import `useSettingsStore` from `@/lib/stores/settings-store` (relative import within apps/web). Since this component is in packages/ui, it needs the store passed as props OR use a context. **Recommended approach:** Accept `preferences` and `onUpdate` props rather than importing the store directly, keeping the component pure.
```tsx
interface PreferencesFormProps {
  language: 'pl' | 'en';
  theme: 'dark' | 'light';
  notifications: { email_alerts: boolean; whatsapp_alerts: boolean; daily_brief: boolean };
  onLanguageChange: (lang: 'pl' | 'en') => void;
  onThemeChange: (theme: 'dark' | 'light') => void;
  onNotificationsChange: (prefs: Partial<{ email_alerts: boolean; whatsapp_alerts: boolean; daily_brief: boolean }>) => void;
}
```

## File 3: `packages/ui/src/components/settings/api-key-manager.tsx`
'use client' component for viewing and managing API keys.
```tsx
interface ApiKeyManagerProps {
  keys: ApiKeyInfo[];       // from @gilbertus/api-client
  isLoading: boolean;
  onRotate: () => void;     // triggers createApiKey mutation
  isRotating: boolean;
}
```
- If keys empty and not loading: "Brak kluczy API" message
- Each key row: name, role badge, masked key (`omnius_abc...xyz` — show first 10 + last 4 chars), created_at, last_used_at
- Copy button (ClipboardCopy icon) → copies full key value to clipboard, toast
- Rotate button (RefreshCw icon) → confirm dialog ("Rotacja klucza unieważni stary. Kontynuować?") → onRotate()
- Card layout with surface background

## File 4: `packages/ui/src/components/settings/index.ts`
Re-export:
```typescript
export { ProfileCard } from './profile-card';
export { PreferencesForm } from './preferences-form';
export { ApiKeyManager } from './api-key-manager';
```

## File 5: `packages/ui/src/components/admin/admin-sidebar.tsx`
'use client' component — left sidebar for admin section.
```tsx
import { useRole } from '@gilbertus/rbac';
import { usePathname } from 'next/navigation';
import Link from 'next/link';
```
Navigation items:
```typescript
const ADMIN_NAV = [
  { path: '/admin/crons', label: 'Cron Manager', icon: 'Clock' },
  { path: '/admin/status', label: 'Status systemu', icon: 'Activity' },
  { path: '/admin/costs', label: 'Koszty API', icon: 'DollarSign' },
  { path: '/admin/code-review', label: 'Code Review', icon: 'Code' },
  { path: '/admin/users', label: 'Użytkownicy', icon: 'Users' },
  { path: '/admin/audit', label: 'Audit Log', icon: 'FileSearch', adminOnly: true },
  { path: '/admin/omnius', label: 'Omnius Bridge', icon: 'Bot', adminOnly: true },
];
```
- Filter items: if role !== 'gilbertus_admin', hide items with `adminOnly: true`
- Active item: accent left border + bg highlight (check `pathname.startsWith(item.path)`)
- Width: w-56, surface bg, right border, full height
- Lucide icons from `lucide-react`

## File 6: `packages/ui/src/components/admin/index.ts`
```typescript
export { AdminSidebar } from './admin-sidebar';
```
(Other admin components added in subsequent tasks)

Also update `packages/ui/src/index.ts` to add:
```typescript
export * from './components/settings';
export * from './components/admin';
```
